content:
Weekly review — 2026-07-08.
1) Cairn beta bug triage (current list, obs, decision):
- CA-117: auth token leak in websocket reconnection. Repro: reliably after 3 reconnects on staging. Impact: P0 (security-ish). Owner: Lucas. Action: hotfix to rotate token on reconnect + add test. ETA proposed: 2026-07-10 EOD. Block release? probably yes.
- CA-101: search indexing returns stale results after bulk import. Repro intermittent. Impact: P1. Owner: Maya. Workaround: reindex job; plan fix for 2026-07-15 in next sprint.
- CA-123: flaky CI test (order-dependent). Impact: P2. Owner: team (no assignee). Action: skip/mark flaky in CI today; root-cause later.
- CA-130: rare data corruption on batch job when DB timeout coincides with retry. Impact: P1 -> needs post-mortem. Tentative postmortem date: 2026-07-15.
Decisions needed: which bugs block the 2026-07-11 deploy, what to freeze, who's doing what.

2) Marathon week summary (work + life):
- Work: heavy week — 3 deploys, 4 incidents handled (one rolled back), ~42h logged, 3 late nights. Energy low.
- Personal: J'ai couru 12 km dimanche, sommeil moyen 5.5 h, poids 72 kg. Budget: loyer envisagé 950 €, dépôt 950 €. Compte courant 3,200 €, épargne 15,000 €.

3) Apartment visit follow-up (visit happened 2026-07-07 18:00):
- Details: flat 35 m2, rent 950 €/mois, owner Mme Dupont, deposit 1 month (950 €), location: 11e arrondissement.
- Issues observed: fenêtre chambre verrou cassé, peinture murs (salpêtre in bathroom), fridge makes noise, missing light fixture in salon.
- Measurements: living 18 m2, bedroom 9 m2, confirm exact window width 120 cm (need to re-measure).
Plan options: demander travaux avant signature OR négocier baisse de loyer. I prefer travaux but need concrete ask.
Actions I want to take:
- Send email to Mme Dupont with photos + list of repairs + propose deadline 2026-07-15 for confirmation. Target send date: 2026-07-09 09:00.
- Schedule follow-up visit to confirm measurements: propose 2026-07-12 at 19:00.
- Documents to bring for dossier: ID, last 3 fiches de paie, attestation garant (ma sœur).

Open decisions / next steps (my rough priorities):
A. Lock down Cairn release: decide release-blocking bugs and freeze features if needed.
B. Assign owners and deadlines: Lucas CA-117 by 2026-07-10, Maya release notes + CA-101 timeline.
C. Apartment: send email 2026-07-09, follow-up visit 2026-07-12, negotiate travaux first; ask for either travaux done or rent lowered to 900 €/mois OR contribution 200 € for appliances.
D. Personal: rest Sunday, meal plan simple (oeufs, pain, salade).

Notes to self: next deploy scheduled 2026-07-11; if CA-117 not fixed, block deploy. Postmortem CA-130 on 2026-07-15 morning. README for beta testers with known issues by 2026-07-09 noon.
End — need to decide now which bugs block deploy and confirm apartment email content.
Which Cairn bug do you want to make release-blocking for the 2026-07-11 deploy: CA-117 (auth leak) or also CA-130 (data corruption)?

Decision: CA-117 is release-blocking (P0) — must be fixed for 2026-07-11. CA-130 is high priority but not blocking the deploy; schedule postmortem 2026-07-15 and mitigation plan after that.
Assignments and mitigations:
- Lucas: CA-117 hotfix + unit + staging test. ETA 2026-07-10 EOD. If not ready, revert websocket feature and block deploy.
- Maya: CA-101 fix scoped for sprint, but produce rollback-safe plan; also draft release notes by 2026-07-09 noon.
- Team: mark CA-123 flaky test as skipped in CI today.
- Ops: prepare deploy-only-bugfix branch for 2026-07-11 (no feature merges), tag: release/2026-07-11.
I'll put the freeze: no feature merges after 2026-07-09 18:00.
Personal: J'ai vraiment besoin de récupérer — je suis crevé.
Pour l'appart: tu veux demander les travaux avant signature ou négocier une réduction de loyer si les travaux ne sont pas faits ?

Je veux les travaux avant signature. Concrètement:
- Email to Mme Dupont 2026-07-09 09:00 with: photos, list of repairs (window latch, peinture salle de bain, frigo, luminaire), propose either travaux finis avant emmenagement OR baisse du loyer à 900 €/mois OR contribution de 200 € pour électroménager.
- Deadline: demander réponse avant 2026-07-15.
- CC broker (Agence Cité). Attach measurements and ask for compteur readings.
- Follow-up visit: confirm 2026-07-12 19:00 (bring measuring tape — re-measure window width exactly).
Documents: ID, 3 fiches de paie, attestation garant (ma sœur). Budget: épargne 15,000 €, compte courant 3,200 €.
Work plan: Lucas fixes CA-117 by 2026-07-10, Maya release notes by 2026-07-09 noon, I will send the apartment email 2026-07-09 09:00. I will rest Sunday.
Do you want me to draft the email to Mme Dupont including the repair list and proposed rent options?

Yes, draft it but I'll review and send. Delegations and timeline (final):
- Lucas: CA-117 patch by 2026-07-10 EOD. If blocked, revert websocket feature and block deploy 2026-07-11.
- Maya: release notes + CA-101 plan by 2026-07-09 noon.
- Me (Sam): send apartment email 2026-07-09 09:00, attach photos, CC Agence Cité, ask for response by 2026-07-15.
- Ops (Marc): prepare bugfix-only branch and deploy window 2026-07-11.
- Postmortem: CA-130 scheduled 2026-07-15 10:00, attendees Maya, Lucas, Anita (Data Eng), me.
- README for beta testers: I'll draft and publish by 2026-07-09 noon, include known issues + workarounds.
Personal: je prends 2026-07-11 en demi-journée off pour récupérer; repas simples (oeufs, pain, salade) et je recharges les réserves (liste courses: oeufs x12, pain, salade, café).
Checklist with owners and dates noted — ready to lock in.
Shall I create calendar invites for: deploy 2026-07-11, follow-up visit 2026-07-12 19:00, and postmortem 2026-07-15 10:00?

Yes — create invites with these attendees:
- Deploy 2026-07-11: Maya, Lucas, Marc (Ops), me.
- Visit 2026-07-12 19:00: Mme Dupont, Agence Cité (broker), me.
- Postmortem 2026-07-15 10:00: Maya, Lucas, Anita (Data Eng), me.
Also: send README + release notes to beta group 2026-07-09 noon.
Final compact checklist:
1) CA-117 — Lucas — fix by 2026-07-10 EOD — block deploy if not fixed.
2) Release branch prep — Marc (Ops) — 2026-07-11 deploy.
3) Release notes — Maya — 2026-07-09 12:00.
4) README beta — Sam — 2026-07-09 12:00.
5) Apartment email — Sam — send 2026-07-09 09:00, deadline Mme Dupont 2026-07-15.
6) Follow-up visit — Sam + broker — 2026-07-12 19:00.
7) Postmortem CA-130 — team — 2026-07-15 10:00.
Personal: demi-journée off 2026-07-11; rest Sunday.
That's the plan — stick to dates.
Final check: CA-117 patch by Lucas 2026-07-10 EOD, deploy 2026-07-11, apartment email 2026-07-09 09:00 — want me to convert the checklist into tasks/invites now?

Yes, convert to invites/tasks and lock the dates. I'll review the drafted email and the README once ready. Closing — I send the apartment email 2026-07-09 09:00, rest 2026-07-11 afternoon, postmortem 2026-07-15 10:00. All set.
